label: Transparent yew branch motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a yew branch, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: One mature yew branch cutting with several woody bark-brown twigs, dense dark green flat needles arranged in two ranks, and a small cluster of vivid red yew arils. Accurate botanical Taxus-style structure, natural uneven branch silhouette, crisp needle detail, matte bark texture, no flowers, no cones, no extra plants.
Composition/framing: centered complete branch cutout with generous padding on all sides; do not crop the needles, twig tips, or red arils. Diagonal branch orientation is acceptable, but the whole subject must remain fully inside the frame.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves deep yew-green needles, red aril highlights, bark-brown twigs, and ancient woodland natural texture.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no woodland landscape, no decorative background, no second branch, no animals, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Yew light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Yew", derived from the visible isolated yew branch cutout with dark green needles, red arils, and bark-brown twigs. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible formal security system.
Reference use: Use the visible yew branch motif as the source of truth. Extract deep yew needle greens, red aril security alert accents, bark brown structure, ancient woodland neutrals, evergreen shadow, and precise needle rhythm. The board must visibly respect these motif colors and textures.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 source board, 3840 x 2160 preferred, crisp readable labels, precise product UI grid.
Required visible sections: Morphous Yew, Yew Branch, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Generated Assets.
Palette direction: dark green yew needle primary, red aril alert/accent, bark brown supporting surfaces, ancient woodland grey-green neutrals, evergreen ink, pale lichen background, and restrained near-neutrals derived only from the motif.
Typography: formal security product UI guidance with English and Japanese type. Use a precise serif/sans pairing for security headings and a Noto Sans JP / Japanese Gothic guidance for headings, body, labels, search, access logs, table numerals, audit trails, and approval workflows. Include short Japanese labels such as 認証, 検索, 監査, 承認.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, top navigation, sidebar navigation, breadcrumb, access-control dashboard metric cards, risk chart, audit trend line, authorization table, command palette, global search filters, empty state, loading state, error state, success state, warning state, toast, pagination, and simple security icons.
Token coverage: shadcn/tweakcn semantic color roles, chart tokens, sidebar tokens, border, input, ring, spacing scale, 8px radius family, shadow scale, yew needle texture swatches, bark grain swatches, focus states, hover states, disabled states, density notes, and token chips.
Style: premium product design system, quiet formal security console, pale lichen and woodland paper surfaces, deep yew-green primary actions, red aril risk badges and alerts, bark-brown structural borders, subtle needle-rhythm texture, high trust hierarchy, compact dashboard density, restrained shadows, all cards and controls use 8px radii.
Text: use short readable labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no beige-only palette, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Yew", no tiny illegible paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Yew dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Yew". It must feel like the same formal security system translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible yew branch motif and the visible light-mode board.
Reference use: Use the visible yew branch and light-mode board as references. Preserve deep yew-green primary controls, red aril risk badges and alerts, bark-brown structure, ancient woodland neutral surfaces, needle-rhythm texture, 8px radius language, compact dashboard/data/forms/table/search/status/token coverage, and English plus Japanese typography guidance.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 source board, 3840 x 2160 preferred, crisp readable labels, precise product UI grid.
Required visible sections: Morphous Yew, Dark Mode, Yew Branch, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Generated Assets.
Palette direction: deepest evergreen yew-needle background, charcoal green panels, red aril alert/accent, bark brown borders, moss-lavender-free woodland neutrals, pale lichen foreground text, and restrained near-neutrals derived only from the motif.
Typography: formal security product UI guidance with English and Japanese type. Use a precise serif/sans pairing for security headings and Noto Sans JP / Japanese Gothic guidance for headings, body, labels, search, access logs, table numerals, audit trails, and approval workflows. Include short Japanese labels such as 認証, 検索, 監査, 承認.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, top navigation, sidebar navigation, breadcrumb, access-control dashboard metric cards, risk chart, audit trend line, authorization table, command palette, global search filters, empty state, loading state, error state, success state, warning state, toast, pagination, and simple security icons.
Token coverage: shadcn/tweakcn semantic color roles, chart tokens, sidebar tokens, border, input, ring, spacing scale, 8px radius family, shadow scale, yew needle texture swatches, bark grain swatches, focus states, hover states, disabled states, density notes, and token chips.
Visual details: dark background derived from the branch's deepest evergreen shadows, elevated panels in charcoal yew green, pale lichen foreground text, deep yew-green primary actions, red aril destructive/risk accents, bark-brown structural borders, subtle needle texture overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls, restrained shadows, all cards and controls use 8px radii.
Text: use short readable labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure flat black background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Yew", no tiny illegible paragraphs.
